entry.title: Welcome back, Xianjing!
entry.content: Xianjing is visiting us for one week starting today.
entry.summary: Xianjing Zhou is visiting for one week

entry.title: Hochan Chung receives Best Bachelor’s Thesis Award

link.title: Hochan Chung receives Best Bachelor’s Thesis Award

entry.content: Hochan Chung (Research Trainee) has received the Best Bachelor’s Thesis Award. Congratulations, Hochan!
entry.summary: Hochan Chung receives Best Bachelor's Thesis Award

entry.title: Happy 80th birthday, Oleksiy!
entry.content: Oleksiy turned 80 (and Erika half that)! Happy birthday to both!

entry.title: Plasmon paper posted on arXiv
entry.content:
Our plasmon paper is now on arXiv! New results on collective excitations (plasmon modes) of electrons floating on liquid helium.

Strong Coupling Between RF Photons and Plasmons of Electrons on Liquid Helium Asher Jennings*, Ivan Grytsenko, Thomas Giovansili, Itay Josef Barabash, Oleksiy Rybalko, Yiran Tian, Jun Wang, Hiroki Ikegami, and Erika Kawakami* arXiv:2601.22552 (2026)
entry.summary: Our plasmon paper is now on arXiv

entry.title: Our Review Article on Quantum Computing Published in a French Alumni Magazine

link.title: Our Review Article on Quantum Computing Published in a French Alumni Magazine

entry.content:
A review article on quantum computing by Tetsuyoshi Yamada, Thomas Giovansili, and Erika Kawakami has been published in a French alumni magazine. Great outreach work!

L’ordinateur quantique : promesses, défis et nouvelles pistes de recherche Tetsuyoshi Yamada, Thomas Giovansili, Erika Kawakami* Les Cahiers de Centrale Méditerranée Alumni « Le quantique », N°59 (2025) [FR]
entry.summary: Review article by Yamada, Giovansili, and Kawakami published in French alumni magazine

entry.title: Poster award and PRL paper featured in RIKEN Research News

link.title: Poster award and PRL paper featured in RIKEN Research News

entry.content: Two pieces of great news: Hochan Chung received a poster award at the 2nd Quantum Technology Interdisciplinary Exchange Conference, and our PRL paper was featured in RIKEN Research News!
entry.summary: Poster award and PRL paper featured in RIKEN Research News

entry.title: International collaborative project
entry.content: Our international collaborative project “Realization of Spin Qubits Using Floating Electrons on Solid Neon” has been selected for the JST ASPIRE program and officially started in December 2025, in collaboration with Mónica Benito (University of Augsburg, Germany), Dafei Jin (University of Notre Dame, USA), and Xianjing Zhou (Florida State University, USA).
entry.summary: JST ASPIRE project selected for international collaboration

entry.title: Tetsu’s farewell party
entry.content: We held a farewell party for Tetsuyoshi Yamada. Thank you, Tetsu, for your contributions to the team!

entry.title: Great News to Share
entry.content: Our Rydberg detection paper has been published in PRL and selected as an Editors’ Suggestion — only six papers were chosen! Additionally, Ash received a poster award at the LT30 conference. Congratulations to the team!
entry.summary: PRL paper selected as Editors' Suggestion and poster award at LT30

entry.title: New cryogenic microwave source developed using a tunnel diode oscillator

link.title: New cryogenic microwave source developed using a tunnel diode oscillator

entry.content: New cryogenic microwave source developed using a tunnel diode oscillator — achieving superior amplitude stability compared to commercial sources.
entry.summary: New cryogenic microwave source developed using a tunnel diode oscillator
